meta.title: Luisa Correa | Content Creator Portfolio
meta.description: Static one-page portfolio for Luisa Correa, content creator and social media manager.

profile.name:
Luisa
Correa
profile.bio: Hi! I'm Luisa, a multilingual Content Creator and Social Media Manager based in The Hague. I create engaging video content for hospitality, travel, and community-focused brands.
profile.availability: Available for Full-Time, Hybrid & Remote opportunities

seaWolf.label: Sea Wolf work
seaWolf.alt: Sea Wolf Instagram profile in an iPhone frame
seaWolf.caption: I worked as a content creator for Sea Wolf Hostels, managing their social media presence and creating engaging video content.

rows.alt: Sea Wolf hospitality photo in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I captured photo and video assets using personal camera equipment.

rows.alt: Sea Wolf reels grid in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I planned, filmed, edited, and published short-form video content showcasing hostel life, local experiences, and traveler stories.

rows.alt: Sea Wolf reels results in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I independently managed content production for Instagram and TikTok.

duqueHostel.label: Duque Hostel work
duqueHostel.alt: Duque Hostel Instagram profile in an iPhone frame
duqueHostel.caption: I worked as a content creator for Duque Hostels, managing their social media presence and creating engaging video content.

rows.alt: Duque Hostel reels grid in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I managed the complete content creation process from concept development to publishing.

rows.alt: Duque Hostel branded drink photo in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I filmed and edited short-form videos focused on community, travel, and guest experiences.

hangout.label: The Hangout Delft work
hangout.alt: The Hangout Delft Instagram profile in an iPhone frame
hangout.caption: At the Hangout Delft, I grew the restaurant's Instagram audience from 11,000 to 13,000 followers within 3 months while being responsible for managing the salon and the staff.

rows.alt: The Hangout reels grid in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I launched a promotional campaign that generated sales of 73 featured dishes within one week.

rows.alt: The Hangout website menu in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I supported the website maintenance using GitHub, basic HTML, and Git workflows.

orangeQS.label: Orange Quantum Systems work
orangeQS.alt: Orange Quantum Systems celebration video still in an iPhone frame
orangeQS.caption: I documented an event from the Orange Quantum Systems startup through photography and videography.

rows.alt: Orange Quantum Systems LinkedIn post in an iPhone frame
rows.caption: I edited a short promotional recap video.
